content: We can reframe parallel orchestration of reader agents to intentionally collect failed data-ingestion trajectories (e.g., failed document parsing, dead-end information extraction) and use self-supervised learning on these failures to dynamically reward reader agents for exploring under-sampled document regions, rather than just rewarding successful information extraction. This turns unproductive failed attempts into a curiosity-driven signal for improving coverage of heterogeneous unstructured data.
source_topics: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
Self-supervised exploration strategy improvement from failed trajectories
trigger_topic: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
